de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface VariableCondition

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractOrInterfaceType, AlternativeVariableCondition, ApplyUpdateOnRigidCondition, ArrayComponentTypeCondition, ArrayLengthCondition, ArrayTypeCondition, ConstantCondition, ContainsAssignmentCondition, DifferentFields, DifferentInstantiationCondition, DropEffectlessElementariesCondition, DropEffectlessStoresCondition, EnumConstantCondition, EnumTypeCondition, EqualUniqueCondition, FieldTypeToSortCondition, FinalReferenceCondition, FreeLabelInVariableCondition, HasLoopInvariantCondition, IsLabeledCondition, IsThisReference, JavaTypeToSortCondition, LocalVariableCondition, LoopFreeInvariantCondition, LoopInvariantCondition, LoopVariantCondition, MayExpandMethodCondition, MetaDisjointCondition, NewJumpLabelCondition, ObserverCondition, SameObserverCondition, SimplifyIfThenElseUpdateCondition, StaticFieldCondition, StaticMethodCondition, StaticReferenceCondition, StoreStmtInCondition, StoreTermInCondition, SubFormulaCondition, TermLabelCondition, TypeComparisonCondition, TypeCondition, VariableConditionAdapter

    public interface VariableCondition
    The instantiations of a schemavariable can be restricted on rule scope by attaching conditions on these variables. Such a condition is realized by a class which implements this interface. The usual place where to put these implementations is inside package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions. For variable conditions that know only black and white answers there exists a convenience class VariableConditionAdapter.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      MatchConditions check(SchemaVariable var, SVSubstitute instCandidate, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled

    • Method Detail

      • check

        MatchConditions check(SchemaVariable var,
                      SVSubstitute instCandidate,
                      MatchConditions matchCond,
                      Services services)
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Parameters:
        var - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
        instCandidate - the SVSubstitute (e.g. Term, ProgramElement) to be mapped to var
        matchCond - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        modified match results if the condition can be satisfied, or null otherwise
